name: Joan Marie Laurer aka Chyna
title: Last known image of Chyna, a video still taken from social media in 2016, shortly before she was found dead in her apartment.
description: This image is a still from Chyna's final YouTube video, titled "Wake Up!", posted on Sunday, April 17, 2016, to her more than 11,000 subscribers. Appearing without makeup, she shared her morning ritual with fans from her Redondo Beach home — chugging water, making a smoothie ("Breakfast of champions!"), and talking about a food delivery service she hoped to launch. "Just this amazing idea," she said. "Unfortunately, it's not going to happen." She ended the 13-minute video with a promise she was unable to keep: "Have a beautiful, beautiful, beautiful day today. And I'm sure I'll be posting more things as this day goes on. Love y'all. Peace!" Three days later, on April 20, 2016, her manager found her unresponsive in her apartment. The cause of death was ruled an accidental overdose of a combination of alcohol, diazepam, and oxycodone. She was 46 years old. Dubbed the "9th Wonder of the World," Chyna had been a groundbreaking figure in professional wrestling, becoming the first woman to enter the Royal Rumble match and the only woman to hold the WWE Intercontinental Championship.
bio: Chyna, born Joan Marie Laurer, was an American professional wrestler, actress, and bodybuilder. She was a trailblazer for women in professional wrestling, becoming the first woman to enter the Royal Rumble and hold the Intercontinental Championship.
